majors.count_method: counted unique Stanford Explore Majors opportunity pages on the official text-only list, excluding the one explicit minor-labeled entry 'Dance (TAPS Minor)'
majors.notes: counted unique Stanford Explore Majors opportunity pages on the official text-only list, excluding the one explicit minor-labeled entry 'Dance (TAPS Minor)'

admissions.testing_policy: ACT or SAT scores are required for first-year and transfer students; Stanford also says there are no minimum test scores required for admission.
admissions.gpa_policy: No explicit minimum GPA found in the cited Stanford first-year pages.
admissions.course_rigor: Stanford says every component of the application is valuable and that there is no score guaranteeing admission; the cited pages do not state a simple minimum course-rigor formula.
admissions.recommendations: Stanford requires a school report form and counselor letter of recommendation plus letters of recommendation from two teachers.
admissions.essays: Stanford's first-year application materials include application and essays guidance, but a structured official essay-count extraction was not completed in this pass.
